body: This PR adds printing for some basic time information (`t_end`, `dt`, `n_steps`), and removes `t_end` from global scope.
title: Add printing of basic time info

body: This PR removes a few more closures, and reduces the number of variables in global scope
title: Remove more closures

body:
modified:   driver.jl
	modified:   sphere/baroclinic_wave_utilities.jl
	new file:   sphere/topography.jl
	modified:   types.jl

# PULL REQUEST

## Purpose and Content
Towards coupler interface, with surface elevation supported.

## Benefits and Risks
Risks: Can be mitigated by ensuring interface preserves existing test results in "no topographical elevation" scenario.

## Linked Issues
(Provide references to any link issues. Use closes #issuenum to automatically close an open issue)
- #408

- [x] This PR has a corresponding issue OR is linked to an SDI.

- [x] I have followed CliMA's [documentation policy](https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy).
- [x] I have checked all issues and PRs and I certify that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.
- [x] I linted my code on my local machine prior to submission OR N/A.
- [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [x] Code used in an integration test OR N/A. (Buildkite)
- [x] All tests ran successfully on my local machine OR N/A.
- [x] All classes, modules, and function contain docstrings OR N/A.
- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: Cli OPT for surface elevation
